zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_1: $self$像是早已习惯，顺势将头枕在$target$的手掌心里，发出一声惬意的鼻音。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_2: $self$并未停下手头的事，只是微微侧过头，以便$target$的手指能更顺畅地穿过她的发丝。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_3: $self$嘴角轻扬，仿佛一只被顺毛的猫儿般眯起眼眸。"嗯？又要开始撒娇了吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_4: $self$主动将发顶往$target$怀里蹭了蹭。"这力度刚刚好，可别停下哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_5: $self$轻哼着歌，任凭$target$摆弄她的秀发，神情中满是信任与松弛。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_6: $self$浑身僵了一下，双眼圆睁，似乎未曾料到$target$会有此举，但并未躲闪。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_7: $self$愣在原地，有些手足无措地眨着眼，任由$target$的大手落在自己头顶。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_8: $self$张了张嘴欲言又止，最终只是红着脸低下头，手指因紧张而纠缠在一起。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_9: $self$身躯轻颤了一下，眼神中流露出一丝困惑，身体却并不排斥这份触感。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_10: $self$紧咬住下唇，身体紧绷得笔直，强忍着闪避的冲动，眼角泛起屈辱的泪花。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_11: $self$死死盯着地面，双手攥紧了衣角，仿佛一个等待惩罚降临的人偶。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_12: $self$屏住了呼吸，不敢发出半点声响，生怕激怒了面前的$target$。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_Begin_13: $self$紧闭双眼，睫毛剧烈颤抖着，满脸写着抗拒与恐惧，却不敢挪动分毫。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_sleep_1: $self$发出轻微的梦呓，下意识地在枕头上蹭了蹭，似乎将这份抚摸融入了梦境。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_sleep_2: $self$蹙了蹙眉，翻身背对$target$，嘴里咕哝着模糊不清的话语。"唔……别闹……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_sleep_3: $self$并未醒来，只是呼吸的节奏稍稍乱了一拍，旋即又沉入梦乡。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_sleep_4: $self$在睡梦中抓住了$target$的手指，将其当作抱枕般压在了脸颊下。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_timestop_1: （静止画面）$self$依旧保持着方才的姿势，发丝悬停在$target$指间，宛如一尊精美的雕塑。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_timestop_2: （静止画面）$self$毫无知觉，视线凝固在上一秒的焦点，任凭$target$肆意玩弄她的长发。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_timestop_3: （静止画面）$target$的手指穿过发丝，$self$全无反应，唯有发型的改变证明着行为的发生。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_timestop_4: （静止画面）好似电影被按下了暂停键，$self$完全无法感知头顶传来的触碰。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_1: $self$笑着捉住$target$的手腕，轻轻将其推开。"别闹啦，刚做好的发型会乱的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_2: $self$敏捷地缩起脖子，避开了伸来的手。"好痒！快住手，今天不想被摸头。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_3: $self$有些无奈地叹了口气，将$target$的手拿下握在掌心。"乖，现在不是玩闹的时候。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_4: $self$护住额前的刘海，佯装恼怒地瞪了$target$一眼。"唯独今天不行，头发还没干透呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_like_1: $self$礼貌地后退半步，拉开社交距离，脸上挂着尴尬而不失礼节的微笑。"抱歉，我不习惯这样。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_like_2: $self$抬手挡在头顶，轻轻摇了摇头。"这个动作似乎不太合适，请您自重。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_like_3: $self$干笑了两声，不动声色地转身去拿东西。"哎呀，突然想起还有事没做。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_like_4: $self$用玩笑的口吻说道："摸头可是要收费的哦？开玩笑的，请别这样。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_1: $self$猛地挥开$target$的手，眼神冰冷如刀。"别碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_2: $self$如触电般弹开，一脸嫌恶地拍打着方才被触碰之处。"恶心，离我远点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_3: $self$冷笑一声，连退数步摆出防御姿态。"你以为你是谁？这种举动非常失礼。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_4: $self$深吸一口气，压抑着怒火低吼："如果你不想你的手断掉，最好立刻收回去。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_1: $self$此时已完全放松下来，呼吸变得绵长平稳，身体软绵绵地依偎在$target$身上。
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_2: $self$伸手环住$target$的腰，声音变得慵懒粘人。"再多摸一会儿……感觉好安心。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_3: $self$抬起头，眼眸亮晶晶地望着$target$，脸颊染上红晕。"你的手是有魔力吗？完全不想动弹了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_4: $self$发出一声满足的叹息，主动牵引$target$的手指抚向耳后的敏感处。"这里也要。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_1: $self$原本紧绷的身体逐渐软化，低垂的眼帘下，防备之色正悄然消退。"……算了，好像也没那么讨厌。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_2: $self$有些别扭地偷瞄了$target$一眼，脸颊泛红。"你是把我看作小孩子了吗？真是的……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_3: $self$沉默良久，发出一声极轻的叹息，不再抗拒手掌的温度。"仅此一次……下不为例。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_4: $self$有些恍惚地喃喃自语："好奇怪……为什么会感到一丝温暖？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_1: $self$的肩膀开始变得僵硬，终于忍不住抓住了$target$的手。"好了，头皮都被你摸得有点痛了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_2: $self$不着痕迹地往旁挪了挪，避开了$target$的手。"我想去喝杯水，先停一下吧。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_3: $self$有些烦躁地理了理被弄乱的发丝，皱眉道："差不多行了，一直这样有点烦人。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_4: $self$径直站起身来，语气冷淡了几分。"有点闷，我去透透气。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_1: $self$忍无可忍地一把推开$target$，胸口剧烈起伏。"够了！你到底想羞辱我到什么时候！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_2: $self$脸色苍白，仿佛接触了什么脏东西般剧烈颤抖。"别碰我……求你了，别再碰我了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_3: $self$眼中的厌恶几乎溢出，冷冷地转身就走。"令人作呕。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_4: $self$捂着头蹲了下去，声音里夹杂着哭腔与极度的愤怒。"滚开！都说了不要碰我！"

en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_1: $self$ naturally leans her head into $target$'s palm as if accustomed to it, letting out a comfortable hum.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_2: $self$ doesn't stop what she's doing, only tilting her head slightly to let $target$'s fingers comb through her hair more easily.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_3: $self$ smiles, narrowing her eyes like a cat being petted. "Hmm? Acting spoiled again?"
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_4: $self$ actively nuzzles the top of her head against $target$'s chest. "The pressure is just right. Don't stop."
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_5: $self$ hums a soft tune, letting $target$ play with her hair, her expression full of trust and relaxation.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_6: $self$ freezes, eyes widening in surprise at $target$'s action, but she doesn't pull away.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_7: $self$ stands stunned, blinking awkwardly as she lets $target$'s hand rest on her head.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_8: $self$ opens her mouth as if to speak but ends up lowering her head with a blush, nervously fiddling with her fingers.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_9: $self$ trembles slightly, a look of confusion in her eyes, though she doesn't seem to dislike the touch.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_10: $self$ bites her lip tightly, body stiff as a board, holding back the urge to dodge as tears of humiliation well up in her eyes.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_11: $self$ stares intently at the ground, clutching the hem of her clothes tightly, like a doll awaiting punishment.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_12: $self$ holds her breath, daring not to make a sound for fear of angering $target$.
en-us.com_touch_hair_Begin_13: $self$ squeezes her eyes shut, eyelashes trembling violently, her face written with resistance and fear, yet she dares not move an inch.
en-us.com_touch_hair_sleep_1: $self$ murmurs softly, unconsciously nuzzling the pillow, seeming to incorporate the touch into her dream.
en-us.com_touch_hair_sleep_2: $self$ frowns and rolls over to turn her back on $target$, muttering incoherently. "Mm... stop it..."
en-us.com_touch_hair_sleep_3: $self$ doesn't wake up, her breathing rhythm only skipping a beat before she falls back into a deep sleep.
en-us.com_touch_hair_sleep_4: $self$ grabs $target$'s finger in her sleep, pressing it under her cheek like a pillow.
en-us.com_touch_hair_timestop_1: (Still Image) $self$ remains in her previous pose, hair suspended between $target$'s fingers, like an exquisite sculpture.
en-us.com_touch_hair_timestop_2: (Still Image) $self$ is oblivious, her gaze fixed on a previous focal point, allowing $target$ to toy with her long hair at will.
en-us.com_touch_hair_timestop_3: (Still Image) As $target$'s fingers pass through her hair, $self$ shows no reaction, the changing hairstyle being the only proof of the act.
en-us.com_touch_hair_timestop_4: (Still Image) Like a movie on pause, $self$ is completely unable to perceive the touch on her head.
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_1: $self$ smiles and catches $target$'s wrist, gently pushing it away. "Stop it, you'll mess up my hair."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_2: $self$ nimbly shrinks her neck back, dodging the reaching hand. "Tickles! Stop, I don't want head pats today."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_3: $self$ sighs helplessly, taking $target$'s hand and holding it. "Be good, now's not the time to play."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_allow_4: $self$ shields her bangs, pretending to glare at $target$ angrily. "Not today, my hair isn't fully dry yet."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_like_1: $self$ politely takes a half-step back, maintaining social distance with an awkward but polite smile. "Sorry, I'm not used to this."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_like_2: $self$ raises a hand to block the top of her head, shaking it gently. "This doesn't seem appropriate. Please behave."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_like_3: $self$ forces a laugh and subtly turns to grab something. "Oh, I just remembered something I need to do."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_like_4: $self$ says in a joking tone, "Head pats aren't free, you know? Just kidding, but please don't."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_1: $self$ violently slaps $target$'s hand away, her eyes cold as knives. "Don't touch me!"
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_2: $self$ jumps back as if electrocuted, slapping the touched spot with a look of disgust. "Gross. Stay away from me."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_3: $self$ sneers, stepping back into a defensive stance. "Who do you think you are? That's extremely rude."
en-us.com_touch_hair_fail_hate_4: $self$ takes a deep breath, suppressing her rage as she growls, "If you want to keep your hand, you'd better take it back right now."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_1: $self$ has completely relaxed, her breathing long and steady as she leans softly against $target$.
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_2: $self$ wraps her arms around $target$'s waist, her voice becoming lazy and clingy. "Keep going... I feel so safe."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_3: $self$ looks up at $target$ with sparkling eyes and flushed cheeks. "Do your hands have magic? I don't want to move at all."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_allow_4: $self$ lets out a satisfied sigh, actively guiding $target$'s fingers to the sensitive spot behind her ear. "Here too."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_1: $self$'s tense body gradually softens, the guarded look under her lowered lashes fading. "...Fine, I guess it's not that bad."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_2: $self$ awkwardly steals a glance at $target$, cheeks blushing. "Do you see me as a child? Honestly..."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_3: $self$ stays silent for a long time before letting out a quiet sigh, no longer resisting the warmth. "Just this once... never again."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_noallow_4: $self$ murmurs in a daze, "Strange... why does it feel somewhat warm?"
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_1: $self$'s shoulders begin to stiffen, and she finally grabs $target$'s hand. "Okay, my scalp is starting to hurt."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_2: $self$ subtly shifts aside, avoiding $target$'s hand. "I'm going to get some water, let's stop for a bit."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_3: $self$ irritably fixes her messed-up hair, frowning. "That's enough, it's getting annoying."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_allow_4: $self$ stands up abruptly, her tone turning cold. "It's stuffy, I'm going to get some air."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_1: $self$ pushes $target$ away, unable to take it anymore, her chest heaving. "Enough! How long do you plan to humiliate me!"
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_2: $self$ turns pale and trembles violently as if touched by filth. "Don't touch me... please, stop touching me..."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_3: $self$ turns and walks away coldly, eyes overflowing with disgust. "Disgusting."
en-us.com_touch_hair_succ_neg_noallow_4: $self$ crouches down holding her head, her voice filled with tears and extreme anger. "Go away! I said don't touch me!"
